title: WLED usermod cdata.json manifest
description: Describes how a usermod's web UI source files are compiled into generated C headers at build time. Consumed by tools/cdata.js. Keep in sync with the validation in tools/cdata.js.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation. Ignored by the build.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Omit to use the baseline schema (implicit v1); only 1 is currently supported. A future breaking change would introduce version 2.

header.description: Header-generation operations. Each produces one generated .h file in the usermod's own directory.

srcDir.description: Folder, relative to the manifest, holding the source files. Defaults to "data".

output.description: Filename of the generated header, written into the usermod's own directory (e.g. "example_ui.h").

specs.description: One entry per source file / C symbol to embed in this header.

name.description: C symbol to generate; e.g. "PAGE_example" yields a PAGE_example[] PROGMEM array plus PAGE_example_length.

method.description: How the embedded data is encoded: gzip-compressed, verbatim text, or a raw byte array.

filter.description: Pre-processing applied to the source before embedding. Defaults to plain (no minification).

prepend.description: Raw-string delimiter prefix; only meaningful with the plaintext method.

append.description: Raw-string delimiter suffix; only meaningful with the plaintext method.
